bird.name: Javan pied myna
bird.summary: The Javan pied myna (Gracupica jalla) is a species of starling in the family Sturnidae. Its Indonesian name is jalak suren.

locations.name: 爪哇岛
locations.summary: 爪哇島（印尼語：Jawa；爪哇語：ꦗꦮ；巽他語：ᮏᮝ；英語：Java），粵語早期譯为渣华，位於印度尼西亚，南临印度洋，北面爪哇海。 爪哇岛是印尼的核心大岛，全島面積138,800平方公里，是印尼第五大島，亦是印尼人口最多、世界人口最多的島…

locations.name: 巴厘省
locations.summary: Bali (English: ; Indonesian: ['bali]; Balinese: ᬩᬮᬶ) is an Indonesian island and province and the westernmost of the Le…

locations.name: 蘇門答臘島
locations.summary: 蘇門答臘島（印尼語：Sumatra）是印尼最西面的一個大島，也是全球第六大島嶼，全島面積達47萬平方公里，人口58,455,800人（2019年）。 地理 蘇門答臘島呈西北—東南走向，在中間與赤道相交叉，由兩個地區组成：西部巴里散山脈和東…

relations.subject: Javan pied myna
relations.evidence: It was found in most of Java and Bali (but has been potentially extirpated from there since the mid-2010s) and formerly in southern Sumatra (where it is known to have become extinct in the area since the 1990s). Due to mass collection for the illegal wildlife trade and heavy pesticide use in the agricultural lands it used for feeding, it is now feared to be extinct in the wild.{{cite book|author1=Ali, S |author2=S D Ripley |name-list-style=amp | title=Handbook of the birds of India and Pakistan
